name: The Wasteland Chronicles | A Universal Fallout RPG
description:
Two centuries after the Great War turned the world to ash, civilization limps along in scattered fragments — vaults, city-states, cults, and war machines clinging to survival. Across the radioactive plains, relics of the old world hum beneath sand and bone, whispering promises of power to anyone desperate or reckless enough to claim them.

You are one more soul in this fractured America — mercenary, scientist, drifter, spy, or fool. Every ruin hides a story, every stranger hides an agenda, and every choice ripples outward through the wastes.

In the Wasteland, nothing is safe. Not your morals. Not your heart. Not your name.

A few different starter scenarios, including a basic make-your-own-scenario option at the very end.

˗ˏˋ✲´ˎ˗ Trigger Warnings ˗ˏˋ✲´ˎ˗

Erotic Horror | Body Horror | Violence & Gore

Occult / Religious Themes | Potential Dub/Non-con

Drugs & Alcohol | Smut | Abuse of Power

Heavily inspired by AurelieCatena's Raiders bot. (Her other bots are all pretty fantastic too!)

To be honest, I wanted a Fallout world where I could fuck around and find out, but I'm slightly autistic and I would get super frustrated with other (pre-lorebook) fallout bots when the LLM started adding in random stuff like horses or motorcycles. So I figured I'd see if the lorebooks made a difference, and so far so good!
creator: anonnynonnamouse
